role: Test suite for the SpineTools MCP module, validating tool definitions, resource handlers, and context enrichment.
responsibility: Provide comprehensive unit tests to ensure SpineTools correctly handles manifest parsing, tool definitions, resource resolution, and context enrichment, with temporary directory management and cleanup.
